title: State-gated breakout deferral
hypothesis: Scarce-slot breakout deferral may be more profitable if it only fires when the weaker of SPY/QQQ is not far above its moving average.
decision: Do not promote. The best 8% state gate still reduced aggregate EV and PnL and increased old_thin drawdown.
next_retry_requires: A more explanatory state source such as breadth, dispersion, or event-backed breakout confirmation.
Do not retry nearby global SPY/QQQ moving-average distance thresholds.
